chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 970 of 2026 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 02.03.2026 Mr. Munir-ul-Haque, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate alongwith Mr. Muhammad Siddiq, Advocate for the Respondents. ---------- It transpires that the Petitioner has no locus standi in the matter as the consignment of which hold has been placed is not one which is imported by the Petitioner. Petition stands dismissed accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz
